name: Animal Vs Human : Farm at war
short_description: Fight to survive from horde of angry locals. Choose from a variety of guns and upgrades to create an ultimate killing machine!
detailed_description:
Animal Vs. Human: Farm at war is a fast-paced 2D horde shooter game where players fight against enemies to survive as long as possible. By levelling up and equipping better gear, players can increase their chances of surviving for longer periods.

Features

  • Fast-paced game play
  • Multiple unique characters to play
  • Auto-firing weapons
  • Collect experience points to level up and select a unique perk
  • Purchase and sell items
  • Manage your inventory
  • Equip better gear to survive longer
  • Compete for a high score

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
